valuation_multiples.supplementary_note: P/DE computed for ~11/25 firms; European firms without US-style DE framework excluded

minimum_sample_rule: N>=12 for formal ranking; N<8 not reported; N 8-11 reported with insufficient_sample flag

key_methodological_decisions.spearman_vs_pearson: Spearman rank correlation used throughout; robust to outliers and non-normality; appropriate for N~25 cross-sectional sample
key_methodological_decisions.no_regression_model: Multiple regression not employed — N~25 is insufficient to support 10 predictor variables without severe overfitting and multicollinearity
key_methodological_decisions.outlier_treatment: Structural outlier 3i Group (FIRM-024) with EV/FEAUM=571% included in primary analysis; reported separately in leave-one-out sensitivity. Not excluded from primary analysis — exclusion rules must be pre-specified
key_methodological_decisions.fy_alignment: All analysis uses FY2024 values as primary period. Non-calendar FY firms (STEP, HLNE, EQT, ICP, BPT, III) mapped to most recent full fiscal year ending in 2024 or closest proxy
key_methodological_decisions.fre_definition_heterogeneity: Material across the universe. 7 distinct FRE definitions identified. FRE_Margin correlations subject to systematic measurement error. See FRE definition table.
